raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teescham/ es darrifchn
fewi par weenu kailu Akmina-
Kalnu/ ta buhſi par Jspleſcha-
nu to Lihlu/ tu ne tapſi
wairs uſtaisihſs/ jo es tas
KUNGS eſmu to ruunajs/
fakka tas Kungs KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas Kungs
KUNGS prett Tiru : Neggi
tahs Gallas no tavas Krischa-
nas Stannas trilzehs/ kad tee
Eewainotee waidehs/ kad tee ta-
wa Widdü ar Kaufchanu taps
apkauti ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Leel-Kungi tahs
Juhras nomettifees no ſaweem
Bohda-Kreifsleem/ un atmetthſs
fawus Givahrkus no ſewim/ un
Swilks fawas israkſitas Dreb-
bes / tee taps ar Trilzefchanu
pgehrbti/ apſehdefees pee Sem-
nes/ un wiſſa Azzumirſſi dreb-
ehs / un isrubhzinafees pahr
ewim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee fahks pahr fewi
veenu Randa-Dseefinn/ un faz-
ihs us tewi: Ka eſſt tu bohjā
nahits tu eedsihwohts Pillsfahts
juheā / tu flawehts Pillsfahts /
as tu ſtiprs bjit Juhrā ar ta-
veem Eedsihwotajcem/ ta ka tu
naligus darriji wiſſus winnas
Eedsihwotajis?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu trilzehs tahs Sal-
as tavas Krischanas Deenaā /
eeſcham/ tahs Gallas Juhrā
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas Kungs
KUNGS : Kad es tewi par
weenu poſſtitu Pillsfahtu darri-
fchu/ utt ka tohs Pillsfahtus/ kas
ne tohp eedsihwohti/ Kad es Dsit-
kumis pahr tewi weddiſchu/ un
leefs Uhdens tewi apklahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad mettifchu es tewi
ſennē pee teem / kas Bedrē
griſſt/ pee teem * muhſchigeem
Laudim. Un nostumſchu tewi
ſennē appakſchejās un tukſchās
Semnes Weetās muhſcham /
pee teem/ kas Bedrē nogriſſt/
ta ka tu ne tapſi eedsihwohts/
un es eezelschu to Jauxumu eekſch
tahs Semmes to Dſhwu.
* Tas irr, pee teem Mirruſcheem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tewi eezelschu es par-
weenu leelu Istrubhzinaschanu /
un tu ne buhſi wairs/ kad tu tap-
ſi meklehts/ tad tu ne tapſi wairs
atraſts / fakka tas Kungs
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXVII. Nodalla.
Ezekiels fluddina ohtrukahrt prett Tiru : t.
Ka tahbam frabſchnam Prezzingeku Pills-
saham : 3. Gawas Lepnibas un Leelibas
pehz ta buhſ ispoſſlitam tapt :4/ 25. Ka
ikkatram buhſ isbihtees : 2.
N ta KUNga Wahrdg
Wnotikke us man / un
fazzija :
2. Tu tad ak Zilweka Behrns!
fahz weenn Randa-Dseefinn
vahr Tiru/
3. Un fakki us Tiru/ kasdsih-
wo us Juhras Preekſchu / un
prezze ar teem Laudim eekſch
Nu 2
dauds
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
